name: GPM Metals Inc.
description: GPM Metals Inc. is a Canada-based mineral exploration stage company. The Company is focused on acquiring and exploring mineral properties in Canada and Australia. Its projects include the Walker Gossan Project, a joint venture with Rio Tinto Exploration Pty Limited located in the McArthur Basin, Northern Territory, Australia, and the Rory Group, which consists of several claims located in the Yukon Territory, Canada.
